meta.name: Enviro Stopper®
meta.description: IP-rated protective enclosure for manual call points and switches
meta.heroTitle: IP66/56 Protective Enclosure for Harsh Environments
meta.heroDescription:
Polycarbonate enclosure with IP66/56 rating designed to protect manual call points and switches against dust ingress, water penetration and unauthorised access.

Available with optional sounder, marked hood and multiple colour configurations.

Suitable for washdown areas, external installations and environments requiring increased ingress protection.

options.6: #6 European back box, 20 mm cable entry, sealed mounting plate
options.7: #7 European back box, 20 mm cable entry, open mounting plate

options.30: #30 Marked hood with sounder and relay
